evidence: EVM IR permits Unit entrypoint returns and rejects Unit let bindings through lowerStatement diagnostics.
Bool literals, predicates, ABI parameters, and return values lower to Yul 0/1 words; unsupported bool storage is rejected by validateState.
U32 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words with dispatcher range guards; scalar U32 storage is accepted by validateState.
U64 values and ABI parameters lower as EVM words; Counter IR covers scalar U64 storage and return values.
EvmHashProbe validates Hash as a one-word EVM ABI/storage value, including Hash params, Hash returns, Hash locals, and scalar Hash storage.

EvmStorageArrayProbe validates U64 fixed storage arrays; EvmArrayValueProbe validates immutable local fixed-array values over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash elements with static indexes; diagnostics reject mutable locals, dynamic local indexes, out-of-bounds literals, aggregate ABI arrays, and unsupported element shapes.

EvmStructValueProbe validates flat immutable local struct values over U64, U32, Bool, and Hash fields; diagnostics reject struct storage, mutable local structs, nested fields, and ABI-facing structs until layout/ABI lowering is implemented.
EVM IR lowers scalar U32/U64/Hash state to direct slot-based sload/sstore and rejects other scalar types.
EvmMapProbe validates Map<U64, U64, N> storage via Solidity-style keccak256(key, slot) mapping slots; diagnostics reject unsupported map key/value shapes.
EvmStorageArrayProbe validates U64 fixed storage arrays as contiguous EVM storage slots with runtime bounds checks; diagnostics reject unsupported array element types.
lowerExpr emits U32 literals as Yul numeric expressions.
lowerExpr emits U64 literals as Yul numeric expressions.
lowerExpr emits Bool literals as Yul 1 or 0.
EvmHashProbe validates four-limb Hash literals packed into one EVM bytes32 word.
ContextProbe lowers userId context reads to Yul caller() and Foundry verifies a vm.prank sender.
ContextProbe lowers contractId context reads to Yul address() and Foundry verifies the etched runtime address.
ContextProbe lowers checkpointId context reads to Yul number() and Foundry verifies a vm.roll block number.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage addition compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage subtraction compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage multiplication compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage division compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage modulo compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-and compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-or compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage bitwise-xor compound assignment; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage shift-left compound assignment with EVM shl operand ordering; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
EvmAssignOpProbe validates local and scalar-storage shift-right compound assignment with EVM shr operand ordering; diagnostics reject non-numeric operands.
lowerExpr delegates U32/U64/Bool literals to Yul numeric expressions and packs Hash literals into one EVM word.
lowerExpr emits local identifiers directly.

EvmArrayValueProbe validates fixed-array literals as immutable local fixed-array initializers and direct literal-index sources for U64, U32, Bool, and Hash values; standalone array values and ABI arrays remain explicit diagnostics.
EvmArrayValueProbe validates local fixed-array static index reads and direct fixed-array literal index reads; diagnostics reject dynamic local fixed-array indexes and static out-of-bounds indexes.
EvmStructValueProbe validates struct literals as immutable local struct initializers and direct field-access sources; standalone struct values remain explicit diagnostics.
EvmStructValueProbe validates field access over immutable local struct values and direct struct literals; diagnostics reject non-struct bases and unsupported field shapes.
lowerExpr emits Yul add.
lowerExpr emits Yul sub.
lowerExpr emits Yul mul.
lowerExpr emits Yul div.
lowerExpr emits Yul mod.
lowerExpr emits Yul exp.
lowerExpr emits Yul and.
lowerExpr emits Yul or.
lowerExpr emits Yul xor.
lowerExpr emits Yul shl with EVM shift-argument ordering.
lowerExpr emits Yul shr with EVM shift-argument ordering.
lowerExpr currently lowers casts as pass-through word expressions.
lowerExpr emits Yul eq.
lowerExpr emits iszero(eq(...)).
lowerExpr emits Yul lt.
lowerExpr emits iszero(gt(...)).
lowerExpr emits Yul gt.

lowerExpr emits Yul or for word-level boolean disjunction.

EvmHashProbe validates dynamic four-limb Hash construction with Yul shl/or packing.
EvmHashProbe validates crypto.hash as keccak256 over one 32-byte Hash word.
EvmHashProbe validates crypto.hash_two_to_one as keccak256 over two contiguous 32-byte Hash words.
ContextProbe validates nativeValue lowering to Yul callvalue(), metadata capability value.native, and Foundry value-bearing calls.

EvmCrosscallProbe validates crosscallInvoke lowering to arity-specific Yul call helpers with selector packing, word arguments, call failure reverts, short-return reverts, and one-word return decoding.
lowerExpr delegates effects to lowerEffectExpr; scalar reads lower and statement-only or unsupported effects reject.
lowerEffectExpr emits sload(slot); Counter and EvmHashProbe cover U64 and Hash scalar reads, and diagnostics cover statement misuse.
lowerEffectStmt emits sstore(slot, value); Counter and EvmHashProbe cover U64 and Hash scalar writes, and diagnostics reject expression-position writes.
lowerEffectStmt emits sstore(slot, op(sload(slot), value)); EvmAssignOpProbe validates all AssignOp variants on U64 scalar storage and diagnostics reject expression-position or non-numeric use.
EVM mappings do not track key presence; diagnostics reject storage.map.contains instead of treating nonzero values as presence.
lowerEffectExpr emits sload(__proof_forge_map_slot(slot, key)); EvmMapProbe validates ABI reads and raw Foundry vm.load slots.
lowerEffectExpr emits __proof_forge_map_set_return and statement position emits __proof_forge_map_write; EvmMapProbe validates previous-value returns and writes.
lowerEffectExpr emits __proof_forge_map_set_return and statement position emits __proof_forge_map_write; EvmMapProbe validates previous-value returns, Unit set dispatch, and writes.
EvmStorageArrayProbe validates storage.array.read lowering to guarded sload(add(baseSlot,index)) over U64 storage arrays, including out-of-bounds reverts.
EvmStorageArrayProbe validates storage.array.write lowering to guarded sstore(add(baseSlot,index),value) over U64 storage arrays and raw slot updates.
EVM IR v0 supports local struct values only; lowerEffectExpr has an explicit struct-array read diagnostic until storage struct layout is implemented.
EVM IR v0 supports local struct values only; lowerEffectStmt has an explicit struct-array write diagnostic until storage struct layout is implemented.
EVM IR v0 supports local struct values only; lowerEffectExpr has an explicit struct storage read diagnostic until storage struct layout is implemented.
EVM IR v0 supports local struct values only; lowerEffectStmt has an explicit struct storage write diagnostic until storage struct layout is implemented.
EvmMapProbe validates single-segment mapKey path reads over Map<U64, U64, N>; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates single-segment index path reads over U64 storage arrays.
EvmMapProbe validates single-segment mapKey path writes over Map<U64, U64, N>; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates single-segment index path writes over U64 storage arrays.

EvmMapProbe validates single-segment mapKey path compound assignment over Map<U64, U64, N> for all AssignOp variants; EvmStorageArrayProbe validates index path compound assignment over U64 storage arrays.
lowerEffectExpr emits EVM context opcodes for expression-position context reads; diagnostics still reject statement-position context reads.
EventProbe validates eventEmit lowering to Yul log1 with topic0 = keccak256(event name) and 32-byte word data fields; diagnostics reject expression-position events and malformed names.
EVM IR v0 supports local struct field access only; storage path field segments remain explicit diagnostics until struct storage layout is implemented.
EvmStorageArrayProbe validates index as the first and only storage-path segment for EVM U64 fixed storage-array reads, writes, and compound assignment.
EvmMapProbe validates mapKey as the first and only storage-path segment for EVM Map<U64, U64, N> reads, writes, and compound assignment.
lowerStatement emits immutable Yul varDecl for U32/U64/Bool/Hash let bindings, expands fixed-array and flat struct local values into internal Yul locals, and rejects unsupported types.
lowerStatement emits mutable scalar Yul let bindings; AssignmentProbe covers mutable U64 and Bool locals.
lowerStatement emits Yul assignment for local targets; AssignmentProbe covers local reassignment and diagnostics reject non-local targets.

lowerStatement emits Yul assignments for mutable local U32/U64 compound assignment; EvmAssignOpProbe validates all AssignOp variants and diagnostics reject non-local targets, immutable locals, and non-numeric operands.
lowerStatement delegates effects to lowerEffectStmt; scalar writes lower and unsupported effects reject.
lowerStatement emits a Yul if iszero(condition) revert guard; AssertProbe covers the passing path and Foundry revert behavior.
lowerStatement emits a Yul if iszero(eq(lhs, rhs)) revert guard; AssertProbe covers the passing path and Foundry revert behavior.
lowerStatement emits Yul switch/case/default for if/else; ConditionalProbe covers then/else storage updates and diagnostics reject nested branch returns.
EvmLoopProbe validates boundedFor lowering to Yul for loops with scalar storage updates; diagnostics reject invalid loop ranges and loop-local returns.
lowerStatement assigns supported return expressions to result and dispatch encodes one-word return data.
